events.event_description: U.S. Legation established in Honduras when the first Minister Resident, Beverly Leonidas Clarke, presented credentials.

evidence.quote: Beverly Leonidas Clarke, Minister Resident. Appointed: 1858-01-14. Credentials presented: 1858-08-10. Died at Guatemala 1860-03-17.

events.event_description: U.S. Legation elevated to Embassy when John Draper Erwin was promoted to Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary and presented credentials.

evidence.quote:
John Draper Erwin, Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1937-07-29. Credentials presented: 1937-09-08. Promoted to Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary 1943-04-27.

John Draper Erwin, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1943-03-27. Credentials presented: 1943-04-27. Left post on 1947-04-16.
